description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with office and party wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Upper Cushioned synthetic footbed with newsprint design for absolute comfort and style Thong styled designer velvet straps with an outer lining in sheen, and has a toe separator to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable outsole with floral grooves and a kitten heel for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Remove dust from fabric using a soft bristled brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
